reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Hay que esperar unos minutos para cargar nafta ya que es la única estación en el pueblo.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. You have to wait a few minutes to fill up with gas since it's the only station in town.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3a095a0Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
El negocio bien surtido con comida y buenos servicios higiénicos. Para recargar bencina ( nafta) hay fila. No sé si se debe a que falta siempre y cuando llega todos recargan. Muy buena atención de las personas encargadas y hay para comer. Frente a la plaza de ChosMalal.

(Translated by Google)
The store is well-stocked with food and has good restrooms. There's a line to get gas. I don't know if it's because they're always out of gas, but when it arrives, everyone fills up. The staff is very helpful, and there's food available. It's across from the Chos Malal plaza.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNWVqQ1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención de todos los que despachan y las chicas adentro del local ....baños cerrados, sucios y sin agua

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from all the staff and the girls inside the store... bathrooms closed, dirty and without water

reviews.comment:
300 metros de fila de vehículos para cargar combustible y 4 surtidores, 1 hora de espera, baños clausurados por falta de agua. Con la atención esmerada de los empleados no alcanza

(Translated by Google)
A 300-meter line of vehicles waiting to refuel, only 4 pumps, a 1-hour wait, and restrooms closed due to lack of water. Even the employees' attentive service isn't enough.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRODREcE53EAE

reviews.comment:
Solo dos estaciones de combustible en la ciudad si llegas medio justo seguramente tengas que esperar un rato para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Only two fuel stations in the city if you arrive halfway there you will probably have to wait a while to fill up
